Instance of FirebaseFirestore used to retrieve entrant data.

declineCoOrganizerInvite(String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter
Declines a co-organizer invitation by deleting the notification from Firestore.
declineLotteryInvite(String, String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter
Declines a lottery invitation by updating the user's status to "Cancelled", deleting the notification, and triggering a replacement draw.
declinePrivateInvite(String, String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter
Declines a private invitation by updating the status to Cancelled and deleting the notification.
DeepLinkRouterActivity - Class in com.example.getoutthere.utils
Acts as a router and dispatcher for Android Deep Links.
DeepLinkRouterActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.getoutthere.utils.DeepLinkRouterActivity
 
DeepLinkRouterActivityTest - Class in com.example.getoutthere.utils
 
DeepLinkRouterActivityTest() - Constructor for class com.example.getoutthere.utils.DeepLinkRouterActivityTest
 
deleteButton - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.ProfileActivity
 
deleteNotification(String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter
Deletes a specified notification document from the user's notifications collection in Firestore.
deleteProfile() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.ProfileActivity
Deletes the user's profile from the Firestore database and kicks them back to the SignUpActivity screen.
deleteProfileAndCascadeEvents(String, Runnable, Runnable) - Static method in class com.example.getoutthere.utils.DeletionUtils
Deletes a user profile and cascades the deletion to all events associated with that user (where the user is the organizer).
DeletionUtils - Class in com.example.getoutthere.utils
Utility class for handling complex cascade deletions to ensure data integrity.
DeletionUtils() - Constructor for class com.example.getoutthere.utils.DeletionUtils
 
DeletionUtilsTest - Class in com.example.getoutthere.utils
Instrumented test to verify the cascading deletion logic in DeletionUtils.
DeletionUtilsTest() - Constructor for class com.example.getoutthere.utils.DeletionUtilsTest
 
description - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
 
description_isDisplayed() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEventDetailsActivityTest
Verifies that the description text is displayed after the event loads.

descriptionInput - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEventDetailsActivity

Displays team data the corresponding details.

drawDate_isDisplayed() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEventDetailsActivityTest
Verifies that the draw date text is displayed after the event loads.

drawDateInput - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivity
 
drawDateInput - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEventDetailsActivity
 
drawDateTimestamp - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivity
 
drawDateTimestamp - Variable in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivity
 
drawLottery() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragment
Calculates remaining capacity by checking existing invites/enrollments - randomly looks for replacements from waitlist Sends notifications to participants if selected/not selected
drawLottery(List<Map<String, String>>, int) - Static method in class com.example.getoutthere.utils.LotteryUtils
Randomly samples a specified number of entrants from the waitlist.
drawLotteryButton_canBeClicked() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragmentTest
Verifies that clicking the draw lottery button does not crash the fragment.
drawLotteryButton_isDisplayed() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragmentTest
Verifies that the draw lottery button is displayed.
drawLotteryButton_isEnabled() - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.WaitlistFragmentTest
Verifies that the draw lottery button is enabled.
drawReplacement(String) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EntrantNotificationActivity.NotificationAdapter
Automatically selects a replacement from the remaining waitlist if a selected user declines their lottery invitation, updating the new winner's status to "Invited" and dispatching a new notification to them.
